name: Eltes Co.,Ltd.
summary: Eltes Co.,Ltd. provides database risk and storage protection consultation services in Japan. It offers social and internal risk management, online reputation management, digital credit, and security services. The company also support information banks, smart-cities, and e-Government with construction of infrastructures for secure information exchange and heavy transactions based on distributed databases and personal authentication systems. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
